what_it_does: This file stores metadata for a channel attachment that links a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
Attachment id att-3e551686 matches the filename
Target is a board:// URI pointing to item-1c3b121f
standouts: Target uses a board:// URI scheme to reference an external board item
The entire content is a metadata stub with no payload
attachment_type board_items signals a board-to-channel linkage
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Filename corresponds to the attachment id
References an external artifact via a URI rather than embedding it
concerns: No body or context beyond the reference
The referenced board item content is not included
No author or modification metadata is present
notes: A bare metadata stub that attaches board item item-1c3b121f to the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content does board item item-1c3b121f contain?
What is the dragnet-development channel about?
Why was this attachment created at the given timestamp?
Is the board:// URI resolvable within the system?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a channel attachment reference, which matches the file; however, it contains only linkage metadata and no item content.
intention_signals: To create a persistent, timestamped association between a board item and a channel memory entry for traceability.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI as the target reference format.
contribution: A persistent, timestamped pointer from a channel memory attachment to a board item, supporting lookup between channel context and board artifacts.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata record named att-3e551686 in the dragnet-development channel that references board item item-1c3b121f via a board:// URI and contains no body content.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to link a board item to channel memory for traceability.
